query:
ALTER TABLE hub_news 
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS regulationTags JSON,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS impactLevel ENUM('LOW', 'MEDIUM', 'HIGH') DEFAULT 'MEDIUM',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sourceType ENUM('EU_OFFICIAL', 'GS1_OFFICIAL', 'INDUSTRY', 'MEDIA') DEFAULT 'EU_OFFICIAL',
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS retrievedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS isAutomated BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_sourceUrl (sourceUrl),
ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_publishedDate (publishedDate),
ADD INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_impactLevel (impactLevel);
